action.reasoning: Observation: DLinear achieved MSE=0.5189 but val_loss plateaued ~1.21 (train_loss~0.55), limited improvement after epoch 1. Analysis: Channel-independent linear projections per feature miss cross-variate interactions in the 7 related ETTh1 series; GRU encoder with hidden mixing + direct multi-horizon FC output should capture temporal/multivariate patterns better while keeping <3M params and fitting CPU time. Decision: Replace model with GRU (hidden=128, layers=2, dropout), update train for 20 epochs + ReduceLROnPlateau scheduler + weight_decay=1e-4, keep stride=3/batch=64 for ~20min runtime (within budget), run then submit_eval on best.pt for improved baseline.
